pi_items.source: Web search confirms com.robert.fcView is the application package for Flight Crew View. The setup and export scripts both strictly operate on this exact package name.
The setup_task.sh and export_result.sh specifically target android.permission.ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION to verify the Allow all the time requirement.
The export_result.sh checks for the absence of android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO: granted=true to verify the microphone permission is denied.
The export_result.sh and verifier logic verify that android.permission.READ_CALENDAR and android.permission.READ_CONTACTS remain granted.

privileged_info_summary: The target package com.robert.fcView correctly corresponds to the real-world Flight Crew View Android application. The required location permission for Allow all the time maps to ACCESS_BACKGROUND_LOCATION, which is explicitly verified in the export scripts. The microphone permission corresponds to RECORD_AUDIO which is checked for denial. The collateral permissions READ_CALENDAR and READ_CONTACTS are verified to remain granted via standard Android dumpsys permission checks.
